programme.title: Autumn
programme.desc: Jamie serves up savoy cabbage farfalle, a smoky sweetcorn burger, cheesy onion soup and a herby tomato galette that's perfect for a crisp autumn day.

programme.title: Gangtey Lodge, Bhutan
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at high altitude, 3,000m above sea level, at a hidden gem of a hotel with Buddhist connections in the remote kingdom of Bhutan.

programme.title: Weekend Wonders
programme.desc: Mary joins her friend Mel Giedroyc on a camping trip and shares some delicious recipes: a hearty chicken tartiflette, a speedy veg ragù and some creamy raspberry parfaits, all made easy.

programme.title: Family Get-Togethers
programme.desc: Nadiya creates dishes ideal for family get-togethers, learns how to perfect her BBQ technique with BBQ-King James, and meets Paul Ainsworth, Michelin Star Chef.

programme.title: Giving Hope: The Ni'Cola Mitchell Story

programme.title: Tampa: Terrace
programme.desc: A wholesale deal in Pinellas Park looks like a three bed house with potential, but when they get there it seems to be more trouble than it's worth. The third bedroom is a garage with an electric panel.

programme.title: Tables of Terror
programme.desc: The restaurants in this episode might be a little scary, but they also serve up food that's scarily good! Join host Michael Yo on a visit to a Tokyo restaurant dedicated to vampires.

programme.title: Mindbending Meals
programme.desc: Get ready for host Michael Yo's brain-bending journey to five restaurants that are meant to play tricks on your mind. Have an "a-ha!" moment inside a black-and-white comic-book world in Chicago.
On a friendship trip to Thailand with real friends, the "Dokbakz" gather to celebrate. Their joy is short-lived, as they decide to pick the one who will shoulder the cost of the accommodation.
Does 'riverside view' mean that little stream over there...? What's the shocking truth about their first-day accommodation that left the Dokbakz crew furious?

programme.title: Cajun Steak Diane with Foie Gras Dirty Rice
programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece makes a soulful Southern twist on steak Diane, a pan-fried beef steak, by adding Cajun spices to the marinade and serving it with foie gras and Creole dirty rice.

programme.title: The Pregnancy Scheme
programme.desc: Pregnant and newly single, Julia faces a catastrophe when she loses her job. A lifeline arrives in the form of her new friend Alana, who says she knows people who would pay for positive pregnancy tests.

programme.title: Wife Stalker
programme.desc: Joanna and Leo seem to have it all: two adorable children and a beautiful house. But their perfect marriage begins to unravel when Piper arrives in town and sets her sights on Leo.

Taiwanese cuisine boasts wide variations of chicken soup, and Chef A-lin has a special recipe. Learn more about how Chef A-lin creates the most complex flavor with the most elegant approach.

Excitement is in the air, but before the team can fully bask in the moment, fate calls them to action. To win their desired home, they must first conquer the ultimate challenge: the Empty Home Quiz!

programme.title: Tampa: Grace
programme.desc: The team scores a major deal when Dolmar is offered a low-price on a home in a desirable neighbourhood in South Tampa. After some debate, the decision is made to turn the home into a long-term rental.

programme.title: Lamb Meatballs with Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Everything Bagel Galette & Upside Down Banana Bread
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Baked Gnocchi & Jammy Olive Oil Cake
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.
The long-awaited grand opening finally arrives. However, trouble strikes for Na-rae's team even before business begins. At the cafe, they face a shortage of cups.

programme.title: Jacinthe and Serge
programme.desc: Serge and Jacinthe have often travelled to the East Coast over the years to visit family. Now they want to find a permanent home for their visits, one they can pass down for generations.

programme.title: This One Hits Home
programme.desc: When a horrible tragedy befalls someone close to her, Theresa continues to deliver messages while experiencing her own grief. Things get intense when the victim of tragedy makes himself known to Theresa.

programme.title: The Neighbors Are Watching
programme.desc: When a handsome neighbor moves in, a single woman trying to escape her past in the new subdivision believes she has witnessed her new neighbor committing murder. Unfortunately, nobody believes her.

programme.title: A Chef's Deadly Revenge
programme.desc: Lucy has just escaped an abusive relationship when she meets the kind Frank, but when she discovers that Frank is stalking her, she decides she's had enough of abusive men and turns the tables on Frank.

programme.title: 国民大会

programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.desc: The clubhouse is inundated with stray ducklings who think Norrie is their mum.

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.desc: With the help of his hero Ron Allum, Lars plans to dive to the bottom of the Mariana Trench in a submersible called the Deep Sea Challenger.

programme.title: Broccoli
programme.desc: It's Broccoli and his floret, Broc, performing their phenomenal ventriloquist act.

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Faceytalk

programme.title: Ragdoll

programme.desc: Dad tells Bluey and Bingo a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the '80s, about a boy who was cursed when he was mean to his little brother.

programme.title: Musical Statues

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. Correspondents across the region present insightful, well-researched and engaging narratives. Americas Now is a compelling, authoritative and balanced voice from the region, giving CGTN a competitive edge in the North American media market.

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. We examine the changes and growth in China's domestic leagues, as the country undergoes an incredible economic transformation.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Global Watch
programme.desc: GLOBAL WATCH is a 60 minute-long news program. The show stresses Chinese elements, emphasizing China’s perspective, policies and stories. The program, relying on global reporting resources, presents in-depth analysis and coverage of major global issues, from a Chinese perspective on international affairs. The program presents to-the-point interpretation of Chinese policies and stories that are of interest to foreign audiences, in a style they are familiar with.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 地狱天使
programme.desc: 年轻貌美的儿（张可颐），牵涉毒杀富翁及争夺遗产，找来石（陈启泰）当其辩护律师。儿的背景神秘复杂，且于有意无意间对石作出挑逗，令石留下深刻印象。_x000D__x000D_原来儿为石妻珊（苏玉华）之同父异母姐妹。儿因痛恨珊母当年抢走其父，致儿母沦为妓女，儿更惨遭嫖客强奸。儿誓要向珊母女二人进行报复。儿接近石，是为要珊婚姻决裂，家破人亡。_x000D__x000D_在儿的精心布局下，石渐转投其怀抱。儿见目标已达，欲抽身离去，却惊觉自己爱上了石。此时，儿情人关（何英伟）利用儿陷害石作其替死鬼，以掩饰其商业罪行……

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 智能爱人
programme.desc: 高端智能人阿宝(李佳芯饰)出厂时意外走失，流落人间，落入古怪寻常百姓家。人工智能公司职员古家廉(陆永饰)如获至宝，私下将阿宝据为己有。阿宝为协助古家四名家族成员执行各项奇怪任务，启动自我学习功能，自此尝尽人间百味的七情六欲，更爱上了主人家廉，体会情为何物。公司高层兼情敌多姐(冯盈盈饰)在公在私对阿宝穷追不舍，誓要把她彻底销毁！与此同时，阿宝却侦测到自己身中计算机病毒，生命正在倒数……

programme.title: Netbusters 2025/26
programme.desc: Relive the best action from the Premier League with this fast-paced ISO angle highlights show, featuring every game and every goal from each matchround.

programme.title: PL Preview 2025/26 (Updated)
programme.desc: We preview Manchester United’s blockbuster clash with Liverpool, Arsenal taking on Fulham in a London derby and Manchester City’s trip to Everton.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost their last two league games against Brentford, more than they had in their previous 11 (W8 D2 L1).

programme.title: PL Rewind 2025/26
programme.desc: One of the most dramatic survival stories in Premier League history, West Ham stayed up against all odds in the 2006/07 season. Robert Green was between the posts for the Irons, and tells the story of their "Great Escape".

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26
programme.desc: I left here as a boy and I’m definitely coming back as a man. With 25 goals in Aston Villa’s promotion-winning Championship season in 2018/19, Tammy Abraham still holds a special place in the hearts of Villa fans. Having risen through the ranks at Chelsea but then moved on by Thomas Tuchel, a determination to succeed saw him win plaudits wherever he played - For Roma and AC Milan in Serie A and lately for Besiktas, but Abraham has unfinished business in the Premier League.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We speak to Dimitar Berbatov, a player whose elegance and composure left a lasting imprint on English football. Focusing on his Premier League years, we follow his rise at Tottenham Hotspur, where his effortless style first captivated fans, through to his trophy-laden spell at Manchester United, where moments of brilliance were often matched by intense scrutiny.

programme.title: Trap
programme.desc: Nekoma High and Sarukawa Tech are having a tight match. Sarukawa Tech wants to reduce setter, Kozume's stamina.

programme.title: The Ultimate Challengers
programme.desc: Defeating Sarukawa Tech, Nekoma advances to the third match. Karasuno and Inarizaki are on the second set now.

programme.title: Leader
programme.desc: With Kageyama's serve, Karasuno gradually takes back the dominance. Inarizaki then appoints captain Shinsuke Kita.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: Struggling with Atsumu's serve and Suna's quick move, Karasuno throws in the pinch server Kinoshita in the third set.

programme.title: Pitons
programme.desc: Because of Atsumu's devoted setup, Inarizaki regains its momentum. Suddenly, someone's play has changed the game flow.

programme.desc: Risteard brings Hadis to Elentzia. Jill urges him to talk as they learn the Imperial Army burned an innocent village.

programme.title: As A Result Of Doing-Over My Life, I Find Myself Out Of Options Once Again
programme.desc: The group sets out to join Crown Prince Wissel’s forces. Jill renews her resolve to remain by Hadis and protect him.

programme.title: My Fiancé’s Uncle Is Behaving So Outrageously That I Can No Longer Stand Silently By

programme.title: The Do-Over Damsel Conquers The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: The Rave royals’ truth is revealed. Hadis, furious, vows to kill them all. His hatred mirrors the future Hadis Jill saw.

programme.desc: Ace and Sabo can't kill the big tiger, but Luffy is starting to master his Gum-Gum techniques after his training.

programme.title: The Fire Has Been Set! The Gray Terminal In Crisis!

programme.desc: The Fast And The Furious is pure faced paced adrenaline-fuelled car action. A rookie cop goes undercover, posing as a racing team member to investigate a series of hijackings.

programme.title: The Changeling (1980)
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: Pillow Talk
programme.desc: The uninhibited story of a carefree bachelor and a carefree career girl and the hilarious things that happen when they tangle.

programme.title: The Chronicles Of Riddick
programme.desc: The wanted criminal Richard Bruno Riddick arrives on a planet called Helion Prime and finds himself up against an invading empire called the Necromongers, an army that plans to convert or kill all humans in the universe.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A former Secret Service agent takes on the job of bodyguard to an R&B singer, whose lifestyle is most unlike a President's.

programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: Beowulf
programme.desc: Beowulf, a Scandinavian hero, battles the monstrous Grendel to save the Danes in this epic adaptation of the classic Old English poem.

programme.title: Apollo 13
programme.desc: Apollo 13 is an inspiring and riveting story of the real-life space flight that gripped a nation and changed the world.

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: The true story of Robert Peace who grew up in New Jersey, the son of a convicted murderer, and defied the odds and went to Yale on a full scholarship. But at age 30, his bright future was ended by the bullet of a rival gang dealer.

programme.title: The Prestige
programme.desc: The quest for perfection drives two magicians to the very edge of sanity and morality.

programme.title: Keanu
programme.desc: Two cousins attempt to infiltrate a street gang to retrieve their purloined pet, only to start a gang war that forces them to take the law into their own hands.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: A down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the teenage son of his new crime boss after fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Jack Black is Po, the unlikely hero chosen to fulfill an ancient kung fu prophecy in this delightful animation voiced by a star-studded cast.

programme.title: Last Breath
programme.desc: An emotionally charged action thriller of a commercial diver who after a freak accident is trapped on the bottom of the North Sea.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: The beloved animated franchise about the remarkable friendship between a young Viking boy named Hiccup and Toothless.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a dangerous crime wave hits the beach, the squad of lifeguards go on a mission to prove that you don’t have to wear a badge to save the bay.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Our lives are the sum of our choices. Tom Cruise is Ethan Hunt in Mission: Impossible - The Final Reckoning.

programme.title: Splitsville
programme.desc: Carey seeks support after divorce, but learns Julie and Paul's secret: an open marriage. Crossing the line throws all their lives into turmoil.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes Of Grindelwald
programme.desc: Grindelwald escapes custody and Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander, who agrees to help, unaware of the dangers that lie ahead.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha were close friends in their youth. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: Alto Knights follows two of New York's most notorious organized crime bosses, Frank Costello and Vito Genovese, and how their separate paths to power place them on a deadly collision course.

programme.title: Four Christmases
programme.desc: When their exotic vacation flight is cancelled, a couple has no choice but to spend Christmas with each of their divorced parents and dysfunctional families.

programme.title: Into The Wild
programme.desc: A top student and athlete leaves his middle-class life to venture into Alaska, only to meet people who will eventually shape his values and life.

programme.title: Lego Jurassic Park: The Unofficial Retelling
programme.desc: The ever charming and now slightly older Chaos Mathematician Dr. Ian Malcolm retells the tale of what happened that dreadful night at Jurassic Park.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon

programme.title: Smurfs

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes Of Grindelwald
programme.desc: Grindelwald escapes custody and Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander, who agrees to help, unaware of the dangers that lie ahead.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Secrets Of Dumbledore
programme.desc: Professor Albus Dumbledore knows the powerful Dark wizard Gellert Grindelwald is moving to seize control of the wizarding world.

programme.title: The Golden Compass
programme.desc: A girl must use her magic compass to seek children, who are kidnapped in a ploy that would endanger the world.

programme.title: iKiss
programme.desc: Sam overhears Freddie confess to Carly that he's never kissed a girl, then exposes his secret on the webshow. Gibby and Carly train Spencer for a tryout with the local professional football team.

programme.title: Tori the Zombie
programme.desc: Tori gets the lead in a high profile school musical, but freaks out when a stage makeup project goes awry and she's left looking like a zombie on opening night.

programme.title: #DroneBabyDrone
programme.desc: Sam and Cat are excited to try a new online drone delivery service, but when they use it, they encounter more problems than they expected.

programme.title: The Itching Scratch
programme.desc: Leo suits up as the Night Ninja one last time to take on the villainous cat named Scratch and his mutant Vampire Fleas. It's a grudge-match fifteen years in the making! But what does it all have to do with Splinter? The final battle begins!

programme.title: Get Rod
programme.desc: No one likes Rod, especially the Turtles! Bishop's former intern keeps trying to kidnap them and steal their mutant blood, but when Rod himself is kidnapped... Mikey is on the case! His first suspect: the mutant-hating Mechazoid maker BISHOP.

programme.title: Friendiversary / Mandatory Music
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward. Squidward does not. // Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: Dopey Dick / Plankton and the Beanstalk
programme.desc: Squidward joins a crew of sailors hunting down the great white jellyfish. // Plankton finds a magic bean that takes him to a land of giants (well, more giant than usual).

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: In the Sky / Best Buddies
programme.desc: When Diamondo refuses to give the twins a ride in his spaceship they embark on some space exploration of their own. // Best becomes entangled in a series of awkward situations when he pretends to know someone he's never met before.

programme.title: Donut Disturb / The Cursed Amulet
programme.desc: Bester unwittingly uncovers the not so delicious goings on in Fritz Fritter's top secret Donut Wonderland Factory. // Best and Bester dig up Captain Ironfoot's Cursed Amulet on the beach only to find that Deep Sea Belle wants it too.

programme.title: Time to Eat / Cleanin' House
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a time-travelling food show. // While Bunny's in Klopnod, the Star home becomes a mess.

programme.title: The Fun Bucket / The Patrick Show After Dark
programme.desc: The Stars celebrate Patrick's birthday at the Chum Bucket. // Patrick and Squidina explore Bikini Bottom late at night.

programme.title: Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. // Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: SpongeBob's Place
programme.desc: When SpongeBob cooks at home, Mr. Krabs' customers leave his restaurant and head for SpongeBob's Place.

programme.title: Cherry Bad Things
programme.desc: Cherry visits, and the Thundermans discover she still has her superpowers. Cherry promises to remove them after her girls' day with Phoebe and Chloe, but the powers malfunction and puts the group in danger. Max hosts Jinx, making Colosso jealous.

programme.title: The Supies
programme.desc: The Supies! Swellview's biggest night for superheros, and Captain Man is not invited. Danger Force enlists Henry's help to make sure the night goes off without a hitch!

programme.title: Mouth Candy
programme.desc: Jasper's enthusiasm in crime fighting leads him to send Captain Man and Kid Danger into incidents that are not crimes. So when he is falsely accused of a burglary and sent to jail, Henry and Ray must find a way to set him free.

programme.title: Bye, Bye, Birthday / Tough Guise
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is. // When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: A Grave Mistake / Leader of the Rack
programme.desc: Lucy faces off against her friend Haiku to become the new president of the Young Morticians' Club at school. // Leni is promoted to temporary manager at work, but she worries about remaining good friends with Miguel and Fiona.

programme.title: Driving Miss Hazy
programme.desc: Tired of doing favors to get a ride from Lori, Lincoln decides it's time to help Leni pass her driver's test.

programme.title: PL-1413 / In the Mood to Feud
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: Wiener Takes All
programme.desc: Tired of doing grunt work at the Krusty Krab, Squidward takes a new job as Manager of Weenie Hut Jr's.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Europe Road Trip: Nonna Your Business / Europe Road Trip: Alpining Away
programme.desc: The Louds journey to Naples Italy to taste the world's best pizza, made by a secretive and legendary chef. // When Lynn crushes on a boy in the Swiss Alps, Lori and Leni become her crush coaches to help her talk to him.

programme.title: Hurl, Interrupted / Diamonds are for Never
programme.desc: Lynn tries to stall her friends from riding the new coaster at Dairyland before they find out her big secret. // After Lola and Mr. Grouse find a precious gem, the two struggle to decide who gets to watch over it.

programme.title: Europe Road Trip: A Bite of Transylvania / Europe Road Trip: Greece is the Word
programme.desc: When the Louds' bus gets a flat tire, they're invited to stay the night in a spooky couple's mysterious castle. // During a tour of the Parthenon, Lincoln puts on a soldier's helmet which sends him back to Ancient Greece.

programme.title: Director's Rut / Friday Night Fights
programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play. // Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: Follow the Sprinkles / Canyon Valley V. Dirk
programme.desc: When Lily starts digging to find out why her favorite ice cream truck is selling shaved ice, she uncovers a town-wide conspiracy. // Dirk is wrongfully accused of stealing a Canyon Valley landmark so Min comes out of lawyer retirement to help him.

programme.title: Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: Krabby Patty Creature Feature / Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. // Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes. Thankfully, SpongeBob's there to show them the ropes!

programme.title: Sanitation Insanity / Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. // A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute!

programme.title: Shrinking Stars / FitzPatrick
programme.desc: The Star family finds themselves getting smaller and smaller. // Patrick's evil twin cousin shows up to ruin Patrick' reputation.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Day of the Dad / Small Blunder
programme.desc: Lori struggles to make a good impression on Bobby's dad after accidentally pushing him into a puddle. // Desperate to have the best show-and-tell in class, Lily takes Lisa's shrink ray to school.

programme.title: Fashion No Show / Doom Service
programme.desc: Leni and Carlota's working styles clash when they are both interning for a famous fashion designer, Mariella Moss. // The Louds book a stay at an all-inclusive resort, only to find the vacation is not what they imagined.

programme.title: The Hurt Locker / Love Stinks
programme.desc: When a sinkhole opens up at school, Lincoln and his classmates are forced to share lockers. // When Lana brings home a skunk to rehabilitate, Lola grows attached when she finds the skunk has finer tastes.

programme.title: The Boss Maybe / Family Bonding
programme.desc: Now the oldest in the house, Leni struggles to follow in Lori's footsteps as the family's babysitter. // Secret agents Lincoln and Clyde investigate the Loud's suspicious new neighbors.

programme.title: Bummer School
programme.desc: Chloe, Jinx, and Booch are designing a new school mascot, but Max and Phoebe's fighting ruins the project. After Chloe expresses her anger toward her siblings, they realize their twin-fighting impacts Chloe in new ways now that they're guardians.

programme.title: The Parent Zap
programme.desc: After Phoebe and Max let Chloe's friends watch a horror movie and eat candy, Jinx and Booch's parents want to meet Chloe's. With Hank and Barb away, Max and Phoebe transform into them to help Chloe. It goes well until the real Hank and Barb show up.

programme.title: Radioactive Cat
programme.desc: Bose's Mom, Celia, picks up Schwoz's lost radioactive cat from outside SW.A.G. and takes it home, so Danger Force and Captain Man have to try and get it back before she goes nuclear.

programme.title: Miles Has Visions
programme.desc: When AWOL starts seeing visions of the future right before they happen, Captain Man believes it must be the work of Swellview's leading time-crime villain, The Time Jerker.

programme.title: Man of the House
programme.desc: When Henry's mom has her purse stolen, Captain Man decides he should move in with Henry's family in order to protect them. Soon, Captain Man takes on a fatherly role which becomes more than Henry likes.

programme.title: Sorori-Tay-Tay
programme.desc: Trish's college sorority is reuniting for a mother-daughter step contest, and Lay Lay agrees to take over for Sadie, who is locked in a battle with Marky over their personal space.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: The Kanga-ruse / The Walking Bed
programme.desc: When it appears the kangaroo mascot Crikey has vandalized the school, The Action News Team tries to prove his innocence. // Lincoln finds ways to break a family rule about hand-me-downs so he can get Lori's old mattress instead of his sisters.

programme.title: Time Trap!
programme.desc: When the kids break Mom and Dad's priceless vase, they decide the only thing to do is go back in time to their wedding day, and prevent them from ever receiving it.

programme.title: Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: Journey to the Otter Side
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: Escape From Beneath Glove World
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are sent to jail in the underground tunnels of Glove World, leading to a daring escape.

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked.

programme.title: Summer Camp: The Grate Outdoors
programme.desc: At Camp Mastodon, Lynn pushes an overly-cautious Lisa to become more adventurous.

programme.title: Sorori-Tay-Tay
programme.desc: Trish's college sorority is reuniting for a mother-daughter step contest, and Lay Lay agrees to take over for Sadie, who is locked in a battle with Marky over their personal space.

programme.title: Cruel Summer
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: Scream Machine
programme.desc: When Charlotte's invention for The Gizmo Show is accidentally destroyed and then rebuilt, Charlotte worries that the attention she gets could expose Kid Danger and Captain Man's secret identity.

programme.title: Minyak Attack
programme.desc: When a tax loophole allows Dr. Minyak to buy the Man's Nest, Captain Man must stand his ground and live with his terrible new roommate while Danger Force tries to find a way to reverse the sale before they lose the Man's Nest for good.

programme.title: The Unusual Suspects
programme.desc: With some loose Mutagen at stake, Mikey questions Rod's siblings, the notorious and eccentric MAUDE and TODD... both of whom are trying to get their hands on some mutant blood as well. Can Mikey find Rod before it's too late?

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Bucket Pants / A Best Too Far
programme.desc: Best and Bester decide Grumpy Pants needs more excitement and take him to have the most extreme cup of tea ever. // In this year's Capture the Flag contest Best listens to other people's ideas even if they haven't got a war room.

programme.title: Spoiler Alert / Something Fishy
programme.desc: The twins go to great lengths to protect Best's enjoyment of his book and realize spoilers aren't so bad after all. // Best and Bester may have jumped the line for the new fish restaurant, but once inside things take a dramatic turn.

programme.title: Chopping Spree / All Bot Myself
programme.desc: Pat The Hapless goes on a barbaric quest to the shopping mall. // After Captain Quasar replaces Pat-Tron with a more efficient robot, Pat-Tron works for the Star family.

programme.title: Star-Robics / Who's the Dummy Now?
programme.desc: In this fitness variety show, Patrick learns how to exercise. // A family of dummies move into the Star home.

programme.title: The Ghost of Plankton / My Two Krabses
programme.desc: Plankton becomes a ghost to steal the secret formula, but requires a few lessons from the Flying Dutchman. // Mr. Krabs gets ready for a hot date, but SpongeBob and Patrick give him a little more help than he needs.

programme.title: Mimic Madness
programme.desc: SpongeBob learns that "imitation is the sincerest form of flattery" - too bad no one told him how to stop!

programme.title: Faulty Powers
programme.desc: After a training accident causes a glitch in Chloe's powers, Max and Phoebe look for a cure. After Max thinks he's solved the issue, he allows Chloe to attend a party with friends, but his treatment creates brand new powers Chloe can't control.

programme.title: Jeers for Fears / Tea Tale Heart
programme.desc: After agreeing to go to The Royal Woods House of Terror, Linc and Clyde have to toughen up and face their fears. // Lola discovers Lucy has an old, fragile doll and decides she must borrow it - no matter what Lucy says.

programme.title: Dad Reputation
programme.desc: While playing in her Dad's new band, Luna is worried about her reputation if her friends see her perform.

programme.title: Kreepaway Kamp Part 2
programme.desc: While at Kamp Koral for a reunion, SpongeBob and the gang are stalked by a mysterious figure lurking in the shadows as campers start disappearing one by one!

programme.title: Dance Off / The show must go on
programme.desc: Jade's a great dancer which results in her facing Mr Best for dance off in person. // Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg Wall Street Week
programme.desc: A weekly program telling the stories of capitalism from around the world, hosted by David Westin in New York.

programme.title: Bloomberg This Weekend
programme.desc: The news doesn't stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humour to the weekend's biggest headlines, live from New York.

programme.title: The Mishal Husain Show
programme.desc: Mishal Husain, one of Britain's best interviewers, brings her signature blend of curiosity and tenacity to weekly conversations with world leaders, business titans and cultural icons.

programme.title: Charlie Scharf, Wells Fargo CEO
programme.desc: Charlie Scharf, Wells Fargo CEO. Philanthropist and financier David Rubenstein uncovers inside stories from the most influential minds in business.

programme.title: UCI Pro Series - Tour of Oman Stage 4 H/Ls
programme.desc: Relive all the drama from Stage 4 of the Tour of Oman where cyclists navigate the northern coast of Sohar to Al Sawadi Beach.

programme.title: Grand Prix Hassan II (250) Final
programme.desc: The Grand Prix Hassan II is an annual professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Marrakech, Morocco. It was Inaugurated in 1984 and represents a major sporting event in Morocco funded by King Mohammed VI, featuring international players.

programme.title: The Ring Master: Alexander Bublik
programme.desc: This 43-minute piece delves into the man behind The Ringmaster, as Alexander Bublik gives an exclusive insight into his philosophy and rise to the Top 10.

programme.title: Episode 40
programme.desc: Catch all the happenings in and around the world of badminton here on the show Badminton Unlimited.

programme.title: BMW Open
programme.desc: A look back at the 110th edition of the Bavarian Open from the MTTC Iphitos in Munich, Germany.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) SF 1
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier tournament held annually on clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Madrid, Spain. As one of three elite European clay-court Masters events, it features a 96-player singles draw and attracts top-tier talent.

programme.title: Day 14 Evening Session: SF 1
programme.desc: The World Snooker Championship is the most prestigious and longest-running professional snooker tournament, established in 1927. Played annually over 17 days at the Crucible Theatre in Sheffield, England, since 1977, it is the pinnacle of the sport, concluding the season's Triple Crown Series.

programme.title: Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell
programme.desc: A look back at the 73rd edition of the Barcelona Open from the clay courts of Real Club de Tenis Barcelona, Barcelona, Spain.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) SF 2
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier tournament held annually on clay courts at the Caja Mágica in Madrid, Spain. As one of three elite European clay-court Masters events, it features a 96-player singles draw and attracts top-tier talent.

programme.title: Miami Open presented by Itau
programme.desc: Catch all the best moments from the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens. Florida.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) SF 1
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Madrid, Spain. It is played on outdoor clay courts at the Caja Mágica and is a key tournament in the European clay-court swing, often considered a crucial precursor to Roland-Garros.

programme.title: UCI Europe Tour - CIC Tour de la Provence H/Ls
programme.desc: The Tour de la Provence is an annual early-season professional road cycling stage race held in the Provence region of southern France. The race is historically connected to the local French newspaper La Provence.

programme.title: 何日君再来
programme.desc: 富家子卓明不顾父亲反对，与歌女雪玲结婚，并因此与家庭断绝关系。婚后，雪玲怀孕，卓明因过度劳累导致视力衰退。为维持家计，雪玲重操旧业登台演唱，而卓明不愿拖累妻子，选择悄然离开。在友人鼓励下，雪玲再次公开献唱，卓明深受感动，最终与妻儿重逢。

programme.title: 万古流芳
programme.desc: 晋灵公宠信奸佞屠岸贾，时边关告急，相国赵盾启奏，反被屠岸贾挑拨，下令斩杀赵家三百余口。幸程婴抱庄姬之子赵武出走。屠下令杀全国男婴以断后患，程不惜以己子代替。赵长大，程以"雪冤图"告之，杀一家三百口仇人乃屠岸贾，更安排他与母亲相认......

programme.title: 虎胆
programme.desc: 明惠帝被篡位后，太子被藏匿在武林义士的黑龙会中，却被武林败类所袭击，迫使入世未深的剑客及侠女带着太子逃亡。他们一路上危机重重，幸得其他义士拔刀相助......

programme.title: 双侠
programme.desc: 宋朝康王被困于金营巨宅，四周被武林高手严密看守。两名身怀绝技的义士必须克服重重困难，完成看似不可能的任务，设法救出康王。

programme.title: 凤还巢
programme.desc: 兵部侍郎程浦将次女雪娥许配予好友之子穆居易，庶室程夫人既愤且恼，对居易讹称长女雪雁乃雪娥，催促二人早日成亲。居易见雪雁貌丑而痴，吓得留书出走。富豪朱焕然对雪娥心仪已久，趁此良机冒充居易，依期迎亲......本片由李香君、金峰分饰男、女主角，配搭新鲜；而蒋光超与庄元庸一胖一瘦的谐趣演出，更令人笑破肚皮。

programme.title: 书剑恩仇录
programme.desc: 乾隆原来并非皇位继承人，而在出生时被调包，但他一直被蒙在鼓里，直至地下组织红花会的人相告。而红花会总舵主陈家洛是其同胞兄弟。两弟兄因身世和利益必需身不由己地彼此对抗...

programme.title: 人蛇鼠
programme.desc: 庄家农场独子庄士德海外归来，接手由胡麟管理的产业。胡一直与德之表妹曼玲勾结，图取庄家产业，并欲利用曼玲美色迷惑德！怎知在阿芬饲养的小蛇「西西」帮助下，反令德与芬结成夫妇。后来胡买来一条专咬人的野老鼠，欲将德之初生婴儿咬死，「西西」为救婴儿，与野鼠作殊死搏斗...

programme.title: 独臂刀
programme.desc: 方刚的父亲为救神风大侠齐如峰而死，齐如峰感念救命之恩，收留方刚入金刀门。方刚却饱受师兄等人的歧视，于是决定远走他乡。齐如峰的独女与方刚决战时，竟用刀斩断其右臂，方刚却因此练成独臂刀法，最终更挺身而出救助齐如峰。

programme.title: 鳄鱼河
programme.desc: 这个故事洋溢着《罗密欧与茱丽叶》般的悲恋色彩。两个世代积怨已深的家族，被一条遍布鳄鱼的河流阻隔，谁也不愿筑桥往来。然而，命运却让两家子女在大学里邂逅并深深相爱。为了相守，他们不仅必须跨越险恶的河流，更要化解两个家族间延续多年的仇恨。

programme.title: 大内高手
programme.desc: 巡按御史傅秉忠因被控伪造公文而黯然回乡。在旅途中，他邂逅了武功高强的燕书棠，便请他全程护送。不久，他们又遇到了逃婚的少女史雪兰和她的丫鬟，二人恳求能同行，以求庇护。众人最终抵达一座破旧的庙宇准备过夜，却不料一进入庙门便遭到匪徒的埋伏袭击......

programme.title: 蝴蝶杯
programme.desc: 明朝时代，书生田玉川因替渔夫伸张正义，误杀总督之子，被迫逃亡。走投无路时，他逃至江畔，幸得渔夫之女相救。二人在险境中情愫暗生，玉川遂以传家至宝「蝴蝶杯」为信物，缔结终身之约。

programme.title: 南北少林
programme.desc: 智明在北少林习武，司马燕则在南少林习武，两人分别为报杀父之仇而合力行刺贪官，引发激战连场!

programme.title: 降头
programme.desc: 狄龙剧中为一准新郎，但却遇上心术不正的恬妮单恋痴缠，更借助邪术降头，务求夺取男方欢心。后恬妮裙下之臣罗烈及狄龙未婚妻，亦相继加入战团。一场因为爱而生与死的斗争，复杂的关系加上正邪大斗法，将人性为达一己私欲的恶行，表露无遗。至于邪是否不能胜正？且看结局便有分晓。

programme.title: Amar Prem

programme.title: Costao
programme.desc: In the 1990s, customs officer Costao Fernandes becomes a legend in Goa due to his bravery and tactics. His personal and professional life unravels when he kills a powerful drug lord in self-defence.

programme.title: Khel Khel Mein
programme.desc: Friends at a dinner play a game where everyone unlocks their phones and shares their messages and calls. The game starts out as fun but it takes a turn when secrets are revealed.

programme.title: Nazar Andaaz
programme.desc: A carefree blind man living with his loyal caretaker inadvertently launches a chaotic competition for his wealth when he befriends a small-time thief.

programme.title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
programme.desc: Ranjan, a small-town romantic from Banaras, gets a government job to marry Titli, but forgets his vow to Lord Shiva. Trapped by fate, he must fulfil his promise in a funny journey of love.

programme.title: Mutua Madrid Open (1000) Final
programme.desc: The Mutua Madrid Open is a premier professional tennis tournament held annually in Madrid, Spain. It is played on outdoor clay courts at the Caja Mágica and is a key tournament in the European clay-court swing, often considered a crucial precursor to Roland-Garros.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Two drugs have been approved for their potential to slow the progression of Alzheimer's disease - we look at how they work and report on new findings suggesting a food-derived component may also help.

programme.title: Trailblazers
programme.desc: Tiara designer Kamitani Taro specialises in custom pieces - now working with a newly-developed material, we follow his creative process to see how he puts sparkle into his designs.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Vanishing Tools. As the rising age of artisans puts the survival of certain crafts at risk, we shine a light on the vanishing tools used to keep them alive and their anonymous designs.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: A new high-speed rail line has sparked a massive rise in tourism to Laos' historic capital Luang Prabang - it's had a major effect on traditional local life in this UNESCO World Heritage town.

programme.title: Chatroom Japan
programme.desc: All mothers need some 'me time' - that's why one forward-thinking woman in Kyoto established Mamo Heart, a space for mothers to relax and also get their own business ideas off the ground.

programme.title: Japan's Top Inventions
programme.desc: Discover the stories behind renowned Japanese products alongside our reporter. This time: automatic floodgates.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Johan Leutwiler from Switzerland is currently Japan's only foreign swordsmith - in a Japanophiles interview, he tells us about being drawn to the world of Japanese swords and sword-making.

programme.title: The Isolado Reemerge
programme.desc: The Isolado have re-emerged in the heart of the Amazon - astonishing new footage reveals how these uncontacted people have changed over the last decade.

programme.title: NHK World Showcase
programme.desc: This programme covers a variety of genres, including pilot episodes of newly-developed programmes and special features.

programme.title: Train Cruise
programme.desc: Spring arrives late in eastern Hokkaido - travel from Obihiro through Japan's food base and along the Pacific Ocean to Nemuro. Taste local delicacies, drive a train, and explore the vast marshlands...

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Japan is a hot spot for discovering dinosaur fossils - an excavation in Hokkaido sparked a nationwide enthusiasm for dinosaurs and led to entertainment such as dinosaur robots and mechanical suits.

programme.title: Rockie and Her Friends
programme.desc: Puppet action show for children. In a distant post-human future where surviving creatures have formed a community, new-breed dinosaur girl Rockie sets out on hilarious adventures with her schoolmates.

programme.title: Take Tech
programme.desc: A programme for upper primary to lower secondary school children about exploring everyday technologies all around them - each episode takes a piece of familiar tech and finds out what it does and how.

programme.title: Sake Truth
programme.desc: We explore various truths about sake - from the koji that determines the taste to medieval innovations that changed sake-making - and examine the science behind why sake changes flavour when heated.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Mornings begin early for fishmongers and vegetable peddlers at Nihonbashi Bridge for a reason - they are not going to bow to the lord's procession in this bustling scene from everyday Edo life.

programme.desc: Male cosmetics and hair removal treatments are increasingly popular in Japan - historically, Japanese men have used make-up for over a thousand years. We look at the evolution of male aesthetics.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Kata-yuzen - the stenciled beauty of dyeing. Dive deep into the ancient capital which is still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical and effective workplace expressions, understand business culture, and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Male cosmetics and hair removal treatments are increasingly popular in Japan - historically, Japanese men have used make-up for over a thousand years. We look at the evolution of male aesthetics.

programme.title: Hit the Road
programme.desc: Fukui: Take a drive from Fukui to Kumagawajuku, a historic post town with Edo-period charm, and discover the exquisite craftsmanship of lacquered chopsticks.

programme.title: Core Kyoto Mini
programme.desc: Kata-yuzen - the stenciled beauty of dyeing. Dive deep into the ancient capital which is still innovative 1,200 years after its foundation.

programme.title: Easy Japanese for Work
programme.desc: Accelerate your Japanese language skills! Learn practical and effective workplace expressions, understand business culture, and improve your kanji.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: A bread maker for many years, Yoshioka Kenichi had a problem with leftover bread crusts - seeking some use for them, he's put the same love he has for bread into making delicious craft beer.

programme.title: Kosovar Sexual Violence Survivors
programme.desc: Vasfije Krasniqi Goodman was the first woman to speak publicly about sexual violence during the Kosovo War - this documentary portrays the survivors' struggles and pursuit of justice 25 years later.

programme.title: I Love 'Mee'
programme.desc: Mee wets the bed even after making sure to go to the bathroom and not drink any water before bed - through a 'Bedwetting Counsellor', Mee learns that physical growth varies from person to person...

programme.title: Design Ah Neo
programme.desc: Entrances: Design is fun - design feels good! Cutting-edge images and music guide children to enjoy exploring the ideas and tweaks in the designs all around us.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: An animated series about a Japanese dog who gets lost in New York City. Charo says 'I want to see my owner again!', and so he starts his adventure to find his way back home.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: Male cosmetics and hair removal treatments are increasingly popular in Japan - historically, Japanese men have used make-up for over a thousand years. We look at the evolution of male aesthetics.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2)
programme.desc: Discover how gooey glazed donuts get blasted by an icing waterfall, while ice cream bars are given a chocolate bath; why health-conscious Korean astronauts take pickled kimchi into outer space; and the lengths that salt miners will go to to put 'white gold' on people's plates.

programme.title: Food Factory (S2)
programme.desc: Discover how spicy salsa gets its peppery kick; a tangy ancient cheese once made by monks gets a modern makeover; crunchy fortune cookies come sweet, tasty and packed full of good advice; and a popular summertime snack gets stuffed with ice creamy coolness.

programme.title: Frenchness
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey across Canada, heading to Quebec and Montreal to experience the French Canadian way of life, which includes sampling poutine, Maple syrup and the obsession with ice hockey.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather (S5)
programme.desc: In California, it's a vacation from hell as hundreds of campers flee a rampaging wildfire. A rare tornado crashes through the Czech Republic and its sink or swim for a solo adventurer as he attempts to row the perilous Pacific.

programme.title: Tanzania - Mount Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: Many call it the 'Roof of Africa'. Mount Kilimanjaro is often considered the easiest of the big Seven. But with a 50% success rate, this journey to the summit is not as easy as it looks.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 (S2)
programme.desc: A new generation of lions, cheetahs and leopards is coming of age in the Okavango Delta.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India (S1)
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong dives headfirst into the glorious chaos of Mumbai and then further to India's seat of power, Delhi.

programme.title: Hidden Frontiers: Arabia with Reza Pakravan (S1)
programme.desc: Reza uncovers the mystery of human survival in Oman-one of the driest places on earth.

programme.title: Monster Shark
programme.desc: After fighting a ragged-tooth shark, Cyril's boat is attacked by a bull shark.

programme.title: Tanzania - Mount Kilimanjaro
programme.desc: Many call it the 'Roof of Africa'. Mount Kilimanjaro is often considered the easiest of the big Seven. But with a 50% success rate, this journey to the summit is not as easy as it looks.

programme.desc: A new generation of lions, cheetahs and leopards is coming of age in the Okavango Delta.

programme.desc: Reza uncovers the mystery of human survival in Oman-one of the driest places on earth.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India (S1)
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong dives headfirst into the glorious chaos of Mumbai and then further to India's seat of power, Delhi.

programme.title: Frenchness
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey across Canada, heading to Quebec and Montreal to experience the French Canadian way of life, which includes sampling poutine, Maple syrup and the obsession with ice hockey.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 (S2)
programme.desc: A new generation of lions, cheetahs and leopards is coming of age in the Okavango Delta.

programme.title: Monkeys
programme.desc: While in Costa Rica, Patrick investigates the declining population of insects and heads deep into the rainforest to find out just how far and wide this dramatic change is being felt.

programme.title: Alexander Armstrong in India (S1)
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong dives headfirst into the glorious chaos of Mumbai and then further to India's seat of power, Delhi.

programme.title: Chocolate Seashells
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness visits a factory that makes 4 million individual Belgian chocolates every day. Ruth discovers the origin of St Nicholas and later visits a chocolate museum.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 (S2)
programme.desc: A new generation of lions, cheetahs and leopards is coming of age in the Okavango Delta.

programme.title: Frenchness
programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones continues his journey across Canada, heading to Quebec and Montreal to experience the French Canadian way of life, which includes sampling poutine, Maple syrup and the obsession with ice hockey.

programme.title: Last Humans Standing
programme.desc: Shocking new insights into the demise of modern humans' sister species, the Neanderthals, Homo sapiens's possible role in their downfall and how it became the last human species on Earth.

programme.title: Chocolate Seashells
programme.desc: Paddy McGuinness visits a factory that makes 4 million individual Belgian chocolates every day. Ruth discovers the origin of St Nicholas and later visits a chocolate museum.

programme.title: Egypt
programme.desc: Cleopatra is the queen of Egypt - but will the age of the pharaohs die with her?

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 冷天曦发现彧修明对叶凌霜有特殊情感，叶凌霜因被误解与翼无忧有染而被彧修明关入天牢，后因其能缓解彧修明的头痛被冷天曦放出。同时，左近天因抗旨并试图杀害界诸婴和七海伶，引发彧修明的愤怒。彧修明采取措施逼迫左近天，并处理了与左近天有牵连的樊家。另一方面，叶凌霜为了解开封印，在得到彧修明的许可后闭关静修三天。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 微雨燕双飞
programme.desc: 荆国安平初年少年皇帝即位，战事纷涌，民不聊生。六品官员白文泰的侄女茉喜（张楠饰）与掌上明珠凤瑶（王玉雯饰）意外被卷进了是非之中。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍成功进入董事会之外，路沙马集团主席方欣亦成为新董事；方欣更直接向一妍宣战。一妍再次要求以珈、丽雪入董事会，惟以珈仍坚决拒绝。明塱医院爆出医疗事故，丽雪的弟弟陈宇泽牵涉其中。丽雪帮忙拆局时，发现事件背后大有文章……以珈心系继女王海淳的前途，希望海淳按照启聪遗愿，前赴英国升读大学，但海淳坚拒不从，二人闹翻。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】医疗事故越闹越大，副院长英杰更有利益输送之嫌。方欣为了让英杰在董事会投她一票于背后操控事件；一妍看准以珈的正义感，放消息让以珈介入医疗事故。以珈得知海淳到了首尔，立即飞抵当地，成功救了遇险的海淳。以珈与受了伤的海淳回港，以珈对前来探望的一妍大兴问罪……

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】建邦告知启澄，传染病事件是永成搞鬼。明塱众多医生被强制隔离，手术被延误，顿时陷入混乱！一妍分身于各手术室，尽力拯救病人。方欣往找永成，提出条件要求他收手……永成的重要客户林鍈伟是泰国有势力人士，其父亲患肝病急需换肝，永成别有用心，给鍈伟提出方法。海淳要求以珈接手一宗医疗诉讼，为在分娩时遇上隔离事件、导致状况垂危的何太，控告明塱！

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍、英杰带队出席交流会，途中被掳走，原来于永成提议下，鍈伟下令掳走一妍等人上货船驶出公海，替其父亲做肝脏移植手术。本为心胸外科的一妍临危受命完成手术，众人获释。关于坠机事故，一妍对方欣明言，怀疑方欣嫉妒进涛与自己结婚而狠下毒手。海淳关切的病人何太终告不治，海淳极为难过，更归咎于以珈置身事外，纵容明塱内斗，导致悲剧发生。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈于德桥帮助下加入明塱董事局，一妍怀疑德桥别有用心。国际刑警进一步证实，进涛坠机是人为。明塱新收患重度先天性角化不全症的女童，一妍坚持要为病童进行风险极高的活体肺肝同步移植手术。明塱多年前曾施行同一手术，却因失误导致病人死亡，负责手术的董立万医生引咎离职。

programme.title: 荣誉:她们的法庭
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】三位律师挚友在专为女性受害者辩护的律所中，面对20年前秘密重现。她们展现钢铁般的团结，直面过去阴影，守护正义与彼此。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 人之初
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一起撞车事件暴露出一具埋藏多年的尸骨，将孤儿高风（张若昀饰）与富家女吴飞飞（马思纯饰）紧紧缠绕在一起。为破解身世之谜 ，他们携手合作配合警方共同挖清这座城市的陈年黑暗。

programme.title: 一念关山
programme.desc: 讲述安国朱衣卫前左使任如意（刘诗诗饰）因机缘巧合成为梧国迎帝使小分队成员，和梧国六道堂堂主宁远舟（刘宇宁饰）等人经历生死，共同成长的故事。

programme.title: Avoidance
programme.desc: Doc has a strong fear of learning about the secret of his past; Giula is left to look after a patient who appears to be hiding something; Enrico must deal with Barbara's assaults, which might be more than just infatuation.

programme.title: The Human Factor
programme.desc: Doc doesn't want a machine to replace him so he gets into a competition with an AI; a case forces Martina to come to terms with her conscience; in order to keep one of Andrea's secrets safe, Agnese must make a horrible choice.

programme.title: Distant
programme.desc: Agnese's words create a conflict with Andrea; Teresa must work wonders to find a place for Diana's daughter; Elisabetta gets admitted to the ward after a few days of illness, indicating a more severe issue.

programme.title: The Shock
programme.desc: A major quake causes panic at Ambrosiano Hospital. Federico faces surgery he's not ready for. Someone could expose Martina's secret. Doc helps a pregnant woman while trapped in elevator.

programme.title: Ties
programme.desc: The deadline to submit the research is approaching, but Giulia seems to be distracted; Doc finds it difficult to handle the numerous commitments; Lin's sister gets hospitalised and it prompts the resident to come to terms with her father.

programme.title: Living
programme.desc: Giulia must make a decision about her personal life that will also affect her career; Martina gives the most challenging exam of her life; Ric is forced to come to terms with Alba's ghost; Lin and Federico resume working on the database.

programme.title: What Needs To Be Done
programme.desc: Agnese's illness forces Andrea to accept her condition; the new head physician handles a case that will require someone to make a tragic compromise; Lorenzo is entrusted with a patient who has arrived from a nursing home.

programme.title: Free
programme.desc: Federico deals with his last day at Ambrosiano Hospital; Martina makes a decision that leaves the rest of the team stunned; Doc must come to terms with the truth Agnese has told him.

programme.title: Awakenings
programme.desc: Doc faces his first day as head doctor with new responsibilities to manage, without ever forgetting the patients despite the pressure of the new Administrative Director.

programme.title: Letting Go
programme.desc: The ward is unbalanced after hearing the news about Doc's memory; Agnese worries that recovering Doc's memory will shake up Andrea's new life; Damiano fears the effect the news might have on Giulia; Doc is increasingly excited.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: Doc keeps delving into his memory and gets a clear lead to follow; Federico is entrusted to take care of a popular travel blogger, but their encounter is expected to trigger more than a few problems.

programme.title: Dreams
programme.desc: The search for Doc's memory appears to have reached a dead end; Federico finds himself under pressure in the ward; Riccardo faces a case that throws him into crisis and pushes his relationship with Martina to the limit.

programme.title: The Benefit Of The Doubt
programme.desc: Andrea asks Enrico to stop the treatment because he finds it difficult to accept what the new memory seems to be telling him; Rita, a young girl, refuses chemotherapy; Andrea and his team must handle the case of a patient they know all too well.

programme.title: The Sail
programme.desc: Doc drags Giulia in his search to understand his past better; Angelo, a patient whose condition forces Martina to prove herself, also has troubles with his past.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Doc appears to be having side effects from the therapy sessions with Enrico; Agnese grabs the opportunity to crush his research into the past; Giulia is certain that Andrea shouldn't give up in spite of his difficulties.

programme.title: Leap In The Dark
programme.desc: Doc finally figures out how to locate the woman he is pursuing, but he needs to muster the courage to do so; Ric takes on the case of an undisciplined personal trainer; Damiano must manage the hospitalisation of a model.
